entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Students spend two lessons a week reviewing the parts of speech and learning how to construct a good paragraph. During the other two lessons, students begin to expand their writing skills with composition assignments from their books. Throughout the year they explore literary concepts such as point of view and experiment with multiple forms of writing, including letters, descriptions, short accounts, and poetry.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Language Study: Grade 7

Grammar/Comp: Grade 7
These lessons, combined with the writing practice students continue to gain through written narrations and additional composition assignments (see the Written Narration/Composition Tracker and assignments), reinforce concepts and build fluency with various types of written forms.

time of publication; however, websites change frequently and may contain objectionable
content. Please report broken links by contacting us through our website.
